meaning: n.助产术,产科学,催生,促成
examples: Smellie improved the forceps and wrote a bestselling practical midwifery handbook.
Hunter's pupil William Shippen successfully introduced male midwifery to America.
Further, new resources must be raised to recruit, train and retain additional health workers with midwifery skills.
Mrs Harry was eventually suspended by the Nursing and Midwifery Council for her role.
The government was supported by Lesley Page, visiting professor of midwifery at King's College London.
